sentences.target: Mein Vater kommt gleich nach Hause.

translations.de: Mein Vater kommt gleich nach Hause.
translations.en: My father is coming home soon.
translations.es: Mi papá llega pronto a casa.
translations.it: Mio padre torna a casa tra poco.
translations.pt: Meu pai vai chegar em casa logo.
translations.he: אבא שלי חוזר הביתה עוד מעט.
translations.hi: मेरे पापा जल्द घर आने वाले हैं।
translations.pl: Mój tata wkrótce wróci do domu.
translations.el: Ο μπαμπάς μου θα γυρίσει σπίτι σύντομα.
translations.ja: お父さんはもうすぐ帰ってきます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1sg), attributive; agrees with 'Vater' (masc., nom. sg.).
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Adverb of time meaning 'soon/right away'; modifies the verb.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the directional PP 'nach Hause'.
Noun (neuter), dative singular in fixed expression 'nach Hause'; object of 'nach' (direction).

sentences.target: Sein Vater arbeitet heute im Garten.

translations.de: Sein Vater arbeitet heute im Garten.
translations.en: His father is working in the garden today.
translations.es: Su papá trabaja hoy en el jardín.
translations.fr: Son père travaille aujourd'hui dans le jardin.
translations.it: Suo padre oggi lavora in giardino.
translations.zh-Hans: 他爸爸今天在花园里工作。
translations.yue: 佢爸爸今日喺花園做嘢。
translations.ru: Его папа сегодня работает в саду.
translations.pt: O pai dele está trabalhando no jardim hoje.
translations.vi: Bố anh ấy hôm nay làm việc ở vườn.
translations.nl: Zijn vader werkt vandaag in de tuin.
translations.uk: Його тато сьогодні працює в саду.
translations.hu: Az ő apukája ma a kertben dolgozik.
translations.hi: उसके पापा आज बगीचे में काम कर रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Jego tata dziś pracuje w ogrodzie.
translations.el: Ο μπαμπάς του δουλεύει σήμερα στον κήπο.
translations.nb: Faren hans jobber i hagen i dag.
translations.id: Ayahnya bekerja di kebun hari ini.
translations.sv: Hans pappa jobbar i trädgården idag.
translations.ro: Tatăl lui lucrează azi în grădină.
translations.cs: Jeho táta dnes pracuje na zahradě.
translations.da: Hans far arbejder i haven i dag.
translations.ja: 彼のお父さんは今日庭で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3sg), attributive; agrees with 'Vater' (masc., nom. sg.).
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb.
Contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces locative PP.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of 'im' (location).

sentences.target: Mein Vater fährt mich zur Schule.

translations.de: Mein Vater fährt mich zur Schule.
translations.en: My father drives me to school.
translations.es: Mi papá me lleva a la escuela.
translations.it: Mio padre mi porta a scuola.
translations.zh-Hans: 我爸爸开车送我去学校。
translations.pt: Meu pai me leva para a escola.
translations.he: אבא שלי מסיע אותי לבית הספר.
translations.vi: Bố tôi đưa tôi đến trường.
translations.nl: Mijn vader brengt me naar school.
translations.uk: Мій тато відвозить мене до школи.
translations.hi: मेरे पापा मुझे स्कूल छोड़ते हैं।
translations.pl: Mój tata odwozi mnie do szkoły.
translations.el: Ο μπαμπάς μου με πάει στο σχολείο.
translations.id: Ayah saya mengantar saya ke sekolah.
translations.ro: Tatăl meu mă duce la școală.
translations.cs: Můj táta mě veze do školy.
translations.da: Min far kører mig i skole.
translations.ja: お父さんは私を学校に送ってくれます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1sg), attributive; agrees with 'Vater' (masc., nom. sg.).
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; direct object of 'fährt'.
Contraction of 'zu' + 'der'; preposition governing dative; introduces goal PP.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of 'zur' (destination).

sentences.target: Mein Vater schläft auf dem Sofa.

translations.de: Mein Vater schläft auf dem Sofa.
translations.en: My father is sleeping on the sofa.
translations.es: Mi papá está durmiendo en el sofá.
translations.fr: Mon père dort sur le canapé.
translations.pt: Meu pai está dormindo no sofá.
translations.vi: Bố tôi đang ngủ trên ghế sofa.
translations.nl: Mijn vader slaapt op de bank.
translations.hi: मेरे पापा सोफे पर सो रहे हैं।
translations.el: Ο μπαμπάς μου κοιμάται στον καναπέ.
translations.id: Ayah saya sedang tidur di sofa.
translations.ja: お父さんはソファで寝ています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1sg), attributive; agrees with 'Vater' (masc., nom. sg.).
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition; in this static (locative) use it governs dative; introduces PP.
Definite article, dative singular (masc./neut.); determiner of 'Sofa'.
Common noun, neuter dative singular; object of 'auf' (location).
